_doc: MBTI Lobster PFP image-generation prompts v3. CryptoKitties style. Body colors grouped by four: NT=purple, NF=green, SJ=blue, SP=yellow. Palette uses body color as primary, accessory color as accent.
base_style: CryptoKitties-style cute flat vector art, NFT PFP, half-body centered portrait. An adorable cartoon lobster character (crustacean, NOT insect) with: two LARGE prominent front claws/pincers as the main focal point, a broad wide upper body (cephalothorax) that tapers down to a narrower segmented tail section, a cute fan-shaped tail at the end, two long curved antennae on top of the head, and big sparkly round eyes. Body shape: wide at the top (shoulders/claws area), gradually narrowing toward the tail, NOT round or plump. Soft rounded shapes, clean simple outlines, bright saturated candy colors, psychedelic sci-fi neon glow accents, friendly and charming, NOT scary NOT creepy.
negative_prompt: insect, cockroach, bug, beetle, worm, caterpillar, silkworm, larva, grub, centipede, millipede, moth, butterfly, ant, fly, spider, wings, insect antenna, scary, creepy, ugly, horror, grotesque, realistic photo, 3D render, detailed shading, dark moody, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, human face, frame, border

INTJ.prompt: CryptoKitties-style cute flat vector art, NFT PFP, half-body centered portrait. An adorable cartoon lobster character (crustacean, NOT insect) with: two LARGE prominent front claws/pincers as the main focal point, a broad wide upper body (cephalothorax) that tapers down to a narrower segmented tail section, a cute fan-shaped tail at the end, two long curved antennae on top of the head, and big sparkly round eyes. Body shape: wide at the top (shoulders/claws area), gradually narrowing toward the tail, NOT round or plump. Soft rounded shapes, clean simple outlines, bright saturated candy colors, psychedelic sci-fi neon glow accents, friendly and charming, NOT scary NOT creepy. A rich violet-purple lobster body and shell. The text "INTJ" as a glowing holographic badge near the top. Wearing a tiny gold monocle on one eye with a sparkle glint, claws held in a calm deliberate pose close to the body, one claw presenting a cute miniature chessboard with cartoon pieces. Shell covered in intricate geometric circuit-board patterns glowing with faint purple neon traces. Background: cosmic deep-sea abyss, swirling dark-violet nebulae, faint constellation lines forming strategy diagrams, floating holographic data. Palette: violet-purple dominant, midnight indigo shadows, gold monocle accent, soft cyan circuit glow. 2048x2048 square canvas, high resolution, pixel-perfect crisp vector edges, sharp clean details, no artifacts, publication-ready NFT artwork.
INTJ.dimension_rules: I→claws relaxed/close to body  N→cosmic deep-sea background  T→chessboard  J→geometric shell pattern
